titleStmt.title: SII 17.546: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 546. (A.R. No. 504 of 1904.) AGATTIYĀṈPAḶḶI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Agastyēśvara temple.
On palaeographical considerations, this inscription may be assigned to the 13th century.

This seems to record the gift of 2,000 kuḻi of land by purchase for service and offerings early in the morning to god Tiruvagattiyāṉpaḷḷi-uḍaiyār in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu in Umbar-vaḷanāḍu alias Taraṇimuḻudum-uḍaiya-vaḷanāḍu by Arayaṉ Pōyaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ, the kiḻavaṉ of Eḻumūr, who is also stated to have reclaimed the land which was lying fallow. The donor is stated to have deposited in the temple 45 paṇam for his purpose, out of which 5 paṇam was provided towards the payment of taxes such as kuḍimai, viṉivōgam, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī .*] komāṟupaṉmar tiri
puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvī
rapāṇṭiyatevaṟku
yāṇṭu patiṉañcar
nāḷ Umparvaḷanāṭāṉa taraṇi
muḻutumuṭaiyavaḷanāṭṭu kuṉṟūr nā
ṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvakattiyāṉ paḷḷi
uṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvarade
varkaṉmikaḷom vyavasthai paṇṇi
ṉapaṭi Ittiruppati cūḻnta nāṉkellaik
kuḷḷum Iṉṉāyanār paṭikka ppu nilam
nañcey payircceyya pā
ḻāy ṟṟu pāḻāy kuṉṟa yamā
ykkiṭakkum nilattukku kiḻpāṟkel
lai tirupuvaṉacuntaradevar Oṭaiveli
kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Aṉiḻa
māṭṭu Otam Eṟukālukku vaṭakkum mel
pāṟkellai Ūrī Oḻukkaikku kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai paḷḷaṉ Oṭaippaṉaṅ
ṭṭuk kuṉṟuvelikku teṟkkum Ivvicai
nta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa pā
mpaṟaipāḻ Ūraḷavukolāṟ kuḻi Iraṇ
ṭāyiram Ikkuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum Iṉṉāṭṭu me
laivakai nāṭṭu Eḻumuril Eḻumurkiḻavaṉarayaṉ
poyaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ tāṉ tirutti Ā
kki Iṉnāyaṉār tirumuṉpe paṭaittu
kkāka māheśvararkku vaḻakkamāka nāḷ
Oṉṟukku Irunāḻi Uḻakku Ariciyāy
c ciṟukālaiccantiyile puṟappaṭaveṇu
m Eṉṟum Ivvarici Irunāḻi Uḻakkum Āṇṭu varai
Iṟukka kuṟuvāḷ kūli Uṭpaṭa nellu Irupatiṉ
kalamum Iṉṉilattukku kuṭimai viṉivokam I
vai maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum cila
vākkum paṇam Añcu Ippaṇam Añcum Inta Oṭuk
kku Uṭal
dharmmam Iṉta
koḷḷu�
tu Innilattukku mulyamāna paṇam
vittu koṇṭa paṇam nāṟpattaiñ
ṟpattaiñcum paṇṭārattā kkuvittu
yil Innilattu Iṉṉā
ṉākkiṉa maramum kiṇo
ṅkaḷum Akappaṭṭa IppaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.546 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
